hooks.command: python3 -c 'import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); p=d.get("tool_input",{}).get("file_path",""); (sys.stderr.write("BLOCKED: server/core/ is HUMAN ONLY (Manual Brain rule). See AGENTS.md.\n"), sys.exit(2)) if "server/core/" in p else sys.exit(0)'
[ -d client/ui/node_modules ] && npm --prefix client/ui run typecheck 2>&1 | tail -20 || echo 'client/ui/node_modules missing — skipping typecheck. Run: npm --prefix client/ui install'

bash -c 'for f in .claude/commands/*.md; do name=$(basename "$f"); wf=".windsurf/workflows/$name"; if [ ! -f "$wf" ]; then echo "DRIFT: $wf missing"; continue; fi; sed "/^---$/,/^---$/d" "$f" > /tmp/c1 && sed "/^---$/,/^---$/d" "$wf" > /tmp/c2 && diff /tmp/c1 /tmp/c2 >/dev/null || echo "DRIFT: $name differs"; done'
